name: CITIC-Prudential Global Merchant Theme Investment Fund QDII-FOF-LOF
summary: CITIC-Prudential Global Merchant Theme Investment Fund QDII-FOF-LOF is a fund of funds that invests globally in companies related to the merchant theme. It is managed by CITIC-Prudential Fund Management Company and is listed on the Shenzhen Stock Exchange. This fund is based in China.
